title: Stir Fry with British Nuts
description: A classic stir fry dish featuring British nuts, perfect for a quick and easy meal. This recipe comes together in no time and is great for any occasion.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped nuts and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Pour in the sweet stir-fry sauce and stir to combine.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the mushrooms are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
If using, stir in the soy sauce or tamari.
Serve the stir fry hot, garnished with additional nuts if desired.
